rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use assign statements in implementation annexes for output bindings
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation annexes
Use concrete bounds or visible relations for range assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Use valid component ports and declared variables in assignments
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq` for equation declarations and `assign` for implementation bindings
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, and constants
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
